\tzpentry{ID5831}{Modified Einstein Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5831 introduces Modified Einstein Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align}\label{eq:modified-einstein} G_{\mu\nu} + \Lambda g_{\mu\nu} = 8\pi G\Big(T_{\mu\nu}^{\mathrm{matter}} + T_{\mu\nu}^{\mathrm{TZP}} + T_{\mu\nu}^{\mathrm{top}}\Big), \end{align}
